content.en:
Rumble!!!!

Ye Tian struck again, and the Eternal Demon Pillar slammed into the Xuanze Realm God.

Burst!

The body of the Xuanze Realm God was shattered, and even if it healed, its breath was already weak, and the Eternal Dao Seeds were cracked~ opened.

"Lord Ye Tianguo, you can't kill me, I'm a member of the Realm Court, if you kill me, the Realm Court won't let you go!"

"Do you think I don't know the Realm Court?" Ye Tian sneered, "An ordinary Eternal Realm God Realm is just an ordinary member of the Realm Court, and the Realm Court will not care about the killing between the Eternal Realm God Realm, and if you die, the Realm Court will not care." "

Seeing that Ye Tian was not afraid of such a threat, the Xuanze Realm God changed his words and said, "Spare my life, I am willing to exchange all my net worth for my life!"

"Kill you, the treasure is still mine!"

Ye Tian said coldly.

"I have a great opportunity!" said the Xuanze Realm God again.

However.

Ye Tian ignored the Xuanze Realm God at all, and made another move.

This time, the Xuanze Realm God was directly and completely killed by Ye Tian.

......

After killing the Xuanze Realm God, Ye Tian took the treasure from the other party and left here.

In this battle, Ye Tian was sure that the other party could not pass on the news, so he used the Eternal Primordial Treasure that imprisoned the information.

Therefore, the information of this battle will not be transmitted.

Of course.

Even if Bei Long Ze knew that he had killed the Xuanze Realm God, he didn't dare to say anything, unless they wanted to find death.

Moreover, there was no half-step Eternal Realm God Realm who believed that he would be able to kill the Xuanze Realm God.

The Endless Realm.

Ye Tian came back, and no one knew that just now, an Eternal Realm God Realm powerhouse comparable to the Great Lord of the Ten Thousand Gods had fallen nearby.

After coming back, Ye Tian began to sort out the items of the Xuanze Realm God.

"The net worth of the god of the Xuanze Realm is quite rich!"

Ye Tian muttered.

He sorted out the treasures of the Xuanze Realm God, including some precious resources, as well as resources that helped solidify the Eternal Dao Seed.

"What is this?"

Ye Tian saw a special thing, it was a purple rod full of mysterious patterns, which was placed at the core of the void in his body by the Xuanze Realm God, and it was sealed layer by layer, which showed the value of this purple stick.

Subsequently, Ye Tian began to study the purple stick.

"Try it with the Eternal Mirror of Divine Appreciation!"

Ye Tian took out the Eternal Divine Mirror for identification.

Time passed slowly, and the purple stick was finally identified.

Xuanxing Eternal Stick, one of the keys of Xuanxing Inheritance

The simple information also let Ye Tian know its usefulness.

"What is this place?"

Ye Tian was puzzled.

However, since this is a secret key, there is a high probability that it can be refined, and some useful information may be obtained from it.

Thereupon.

Ye Tian began to refine this Xuanxing Eternal Rod.

Time passed slowly, and Ye Tian was gradually about to succeed in refining.

And the fall of the gods of the Xuanze Realm has not caused any waves, or it has not been spread yet.

After all, if an Eternal Realm God Realm has been missing for a period of time, it is nothing at all, no one will care, let alone deduce the life and death of an Eternal Realm God Realm, unless it is suspected that the other party has fallen, this will pay the price to deduce.

Obviously, it hasn't been to that point yet.

A long time has passed.

The Xuanxing Eternal Rod was finally successfully refined by Ye Tian.

At this time, Ye Tian sensed the coordinates of a floating realm and the trajectory of the other party's movement through the Xuanxing Eternal Rod, as well as some simple information.

Through this information and coordinates, Ye Tian judged that the so-called Xuanxing Inheritance Land should be in that floating realm, and the Xuanxing Eternal Rod could allow him to enter the Xuanxing Inheritance Land.

"That Floating Realm is still moving, but it should be bordering the Eternal Border!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

At this moment, he finally knew why the Xuanze Realm God had returned from the Realm God Realm, and he was afraid that it was not for the revenge of those half-step Eternal Realm God Realms at all, but for entering the Xuanxing Inheritance Land.

If it weren't for the Xuanxing Inheritance, it is estimated that the Xuanze Realm Gods would not come back at all, and they would not care about the deaths of those half-step Eternal Realm Gods.

After all, if you come back, but you don't want to take revenge, this is a bit unreasonable, and you will undoubtedly be secretly ridiculed by many Eternal Dao Realms.

As a result, just for the sake of a little face, the god of the Xuanze Realm provoked his own unprovoked existence and lost his life.

I have to say that the gods of the Xuanze realm are a little wronged.

But Beilongze's reputation is not good, and the reputation of this guy in the Xuanze Realm God is not expected to be any better, so if you kill it, you will kill it.

......

Another time passed.

Ye Tian sensed with the help of the Xuanxing Eternal Rod, that the floating realm finally stopped moving, and it was completely bordering the eternal realm.

Wow!

Ye Tian immediately rushed over with the Xuanxing Eternal Rod, and went to enter the floating realm.

He's been tracking that floating realm, so it's close at the moment.

Not long after, Ye Tian came to the location of the entrance to this floating realm.

"This is it!"

Ye Tian casually tore the entrance to this floating realm and entered it.

In an instant.

Ye Tian entered this floating realm, only to find that it was almost a ruin.

In addition, this floating world seems to be very simple, the rules are very strong, even he has been suppressed, and the ordinary floating world can't do it to such an extent.

Subsequently.

Ye Tian began to condense the new replica body, and then slowly explored this floating realm.

It doesn't matter if the copy body is killed, if the Xuanxing Eternal Stick is lost, it will be too much loss.

This thing even attaches great importance to the Eternal Realm God Realm, and the Xuanze Realm God also said a big opportunity before he died, he doesn't want to lose a big opportunity.

So, you have to be careful.

Soon.

Ye Tian's copy body came to the central area of the Floating Realm, where he saw an ancient building that was unimaginably brilliant and huge, and this ancient building was rooted in the void, and at the entrance was an ancient stone gate, and its aura was extremely terrifying.

"This building is not simple, it should be built by a very powerful being or an extremely terrifying force. "

Ye Tian guessed.

And Ye Tian attacked this stone gate, but his attack couldn't help this stone gate at all, and was even shocked out by it.

Moreover, the formation of this building was too mysterious and profound, he couldn't understand it at all, and he couldn't break this formation.

But.

He found that there was a hole in the old stone door.

Seeing this hole, Ye Tian thought of the Xuanxing Eternal Rod, which seemed to be able to be put in.

And so.

Ye Tian's other copy body came over and put the Xuanxing Eternal Rod.
